members.name: AddTab
members.signature: public void AddTab(String title, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Adds a new tab.

members.name: ClearTabs
members.summary: Clears all tabs.

members.name: EnsureTabVisible
members.summary: Moves the scroll view to make the tab visible.

members.name: GetOffsetButtonsVisible
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the offset buttons (the ones that appear when there's not enough space for all tabs) are visible.

members.name: GetPreviousTab
members.summary: Returns the previously active tab index.

members.name: GetTabButtonIcon
members.summary: Returns the icon for the right button of the tab at index [param tab_idx] or [code]null[/code] if the right button has no icon.

members.name: GetTabIcon
members.summary: Returns the icon for the tab at index [param tab_idx] or [code]null[/code] if the tab has no icon.

members.name: GetTabIconMaxWidth
members.summary: Returns the maximum allowed width of the icon for the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: GetTabIdxAtPoint
members.summary: Returns the index of the tab at local coordinates [param point]. Returns [code]-1[/code] if the point is outside the control boundaries or if there's no tab at the queried position.

members.name: GetTabLanguage
members.summary: Returns tab title language code.

members.name: GetTabMetadata
members.summary: Returns the metadata value set to the tab at index [param tab_idx] using [method set_tab_metadata]. If no metadata was previously set, returns [code]null[/code] by default.

members.name: GetTabOffset
members.summary: Returns the number of hidden tabs offsetted to the left.

members.name: GetTabRect
members.summary: Returns tab [Rect2] with local position and size.

members.name: GetTabTextDirection
members.summary: Returns tab title text base writing direction.

members.name: GetTabTitle
members.summary: Returns the title of the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: GetTabTooltip
members.summary: Returns the tooltip text of the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: IsTabDisabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the tab at index [param tab_idx] is disabled.

members.name: IsTabHidden
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the tab at index [param tab_idx] is hidden.

members.name: MoveTab
members.signature: public void MoveTab(int from, int to)
members.summary: Moves a tab from [param from] to [param to].

members.name: RemoveTab
members.summary: Removes the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: SelectNextAvailable
members.summary: Selects the first available tab with greater index than the currently selected. Returns [code]true[/code] if tab selection changed.

members.name: SelectPreviousAvailable
members.summary: Selects the first available tab with lower index than the currently selected. Returns [code]true[/code] if tab selection changed.

members.name: SetTabButtonIcon
members.signature: public void SetTabButtonIcon(int tabIdx, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Sets an [param icon] for the button of the tab at index [param tab_idx] (located to the right, before the close button), making it visible and clickable (See [signal tab_button_pressed]). Giving it a [code]null[/code] value will hide the button.

members.name: SetTabDisabled
members.signature: public void SetTabDisabled(int tabIdx, bool disabled)
members.summary: If [param disabled] is [code]true[/code], disables the tab at index [param tab_idx], making it non-interactable.

members.name: SetTabHidden
members.signature: public void SetTabHidden(int tabIdx, bool hidden)
members.summary: If [param hidden] is [code]true[/code], hides the tab at index [param tab_idx], making it disappear from the tab area.

members.name: SetTabIcon
members.signature: public void SetTabIcon(int tabIdx, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Sets an [param icon] for the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: SetTabIconMaxWidth
members.signature: public void SetTabIconMaxWidth(int tabIdx, int width)
members.summary: Sets the maximum allowed width of the icon for the tab at index [param tab_idx]. This limit is applied on top of the default size of the icon and on top of [theme_item icon_max_width]. The height is adjusted according to the icon's ratio.

members.name: SetTabLanguage
members.signature: public void SetTabLanguage(int tabIdx, String language)
members.summary: Sets the language code of the title for the tab at index [param tab_idx] to [param language]. This is used for line-breaking and text shaping algorithms. If [param language] is empty, the current locale is used.

members.name: SetTabMetadata
members.signature: public void SetTabMetadata(int tabIdx, Variant metadata)
members.summary: Sets the metadata value for the tab at index [param tab_idx], which can be retrieved later using [method get_tab_metadata].

members.name: SetTabTextDirection
members.signature: public void SetTabTextDirection(int tabIdx, int direction)
members.summary: Sets tab title base writing direction.

members.name: SetTabTitle
members.signature: public void SetTabTitle(int tabIdx, String title)
members.summary: Sets a [param title] for the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: SetTabTooltip
members.signature: public void SetTabTooltip(int tabIdx, String tooltip)
members.summary: Sets a [param tooltip] for tab at index [param tab_idx]. [b]Note:[/b] By default, if the [param tooltip] is empty and the tab text is truncated (not all characters fit into the tab), the title will be displayed as a tooltip. To hide the tooltip, assign [code]" "[/code] as the [param tooltip] text.

members.name: ClipTabs
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], tabs overflowing this node's width will be hidden, displaying two navigation buttons instead. Otherwise, this node's minimum size is updated so that all tabs are visible.

members.name: CloseWithMiddleMouse
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], middle-clicking on a tab will emit the [signal tab_close_pressed] signal.

members.name: CurrentTab
members.summary: The index of the current selected tab. A value of [code]-1[/code] means that no tab is selected and can only be set when [member deselect_enabled] is [code]true[/code] or if all tabs are hidden or disabled.

members.name: DeselectEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], all tabs can be deselected so that no tab is selected. Click on the current tab to deselect it.

members.name: DragToRearrangeEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], tabs can be rearranged with mouse drag.

members.name: MaxTabWidth
members.summary: Sets the maximum width which all tabs should be limited to. Unlimited if set to [code]0[/code].

members.name: ScrollToSelected
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the tab offset will be changed to keep the currently selected tab visible.

members.name: ScrollingEnabled
members.summary: if [code]true[/code], the mouse's scroll wheel can be used to navigate the scroll view.

members.name: SelectWithRmb
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], enables selecting a tab with the right mouse button.

members.name: SwitchOnDragHover
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], hovering over a tab while dragging something will switch to that tab. Does not have effect when hovering another tab to rearrange. The delay for when this happens is dictated by [theme_item hover_switch_wait_msec].

members.name: TabAlignment
members.summary: The horizontal alignment of the tabs.

members.name: TabCloseDisplayPolicy
members.summary: When the close button will appear on the tabs.

members.name: TabCount
members.summary: The number of tabs currently in the bar.

members.name: TabsRearrangeGroup
members.summary: [TabBar]s with the same rearrange group ID will allow dragging the tabs between them. Enable drag with [member drag_to_rearrange_enabled]. Setting this to [code]-1[/code] will disable rearranging between [TabBar]s.

rawMembers.name: tab_{index}/disabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the tab at [code]index[/code] is disabled. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. tab_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: tab_{index}/icon
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the tab at [code]index[/code] is hidden. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. tab_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: tab_{index}/title
rawMembers.summary: The title text of the tab at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. tab_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: tab_{index}/tooltip
rawMembers.summary: The tooltip text of the tab at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. tab_count - 1[/code] range.

signals.name: ActiveTabRearranged
signals.summary: Emitted when the active tab is rearranged via mouse drag. See [member drag_to_rearrange_enabled].

signals.name: TabButtonPressed
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab's right button is pressed. See [method set_tab_button_icon].

signals.name: TabChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when switching to another tab.

signals.name: TabClicked
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab is clicked, even if it is the current tab.

signals.name: TabClosePressed
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab's close button is pressed or, if [member close_with_middle_mouse] is [code]true[/code], when middle-clicking on a tab. [b]Note:[/b] Tabs are not removed automatically; this behavior needs to be coded manually. For example: [codeblocks] [gdscript] $TabBar.tab_close_pressed.connect($TabBar.remove_tab) [/gdscript] [csharp] GetNode<TabBar>("TabBar").TabClosePressed += GetNode<TabBar>("TabBar").RemoveTab; [/csharp] [/codeblocks]

signals.name: TabHovered
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab is hovered by the mouse.

signals.name: TabRmbClicked
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab is right-clicked.

signals.name: TabSelected
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab is selected via click, directional input, or script, even if it is the current tab.

values.name: ALIGNMENT_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum AlignmentMode] enum.

values.name: CLOSE_BUTTON_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum CloseButtonDisplayPolicy] enum.

values.name: CLOSE_BUTTON_SHOW_ACTIVE_ONLY
values.summary: Only show the close button on the currently active tab.

values.name: CLOSE_BUTTON_SHOW_ALWAYS
values.summary: Show the close button on all tabs.

constants.name: ALIGNMENT_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum AlignmentMode] enum.

constants.name: CLOSE_BUTTON_SHOW_ACTIVE_ONLY
constants.summary: Only show the close button on the currently active tab.

constants.name: CLOSE_BUTTON_SHOW_ALWAYS
constants.summary: Show the close button on all tabs.

constants.name: CLOSE_BUTTON_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum CloseButtonDisplayPolicy] enum.
